section.heading: Regulations or guidelines

content.p: Not later than 120 days after September 13, 1994, the Attorney General shall publish proposed regulations or guidelines implementing this subchapter. Not later than 180 days after September 13, 1994, the Attorney General shall publish final regulations or guidelines implementing this subchapter.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 90–351, title I, § 2105, formerly § 2104, as added Pub. L. 103–322, title IV, § 40231(a)(3), Sept. 13, 1994, 108 Stat. 1933; renumbered § 2105, Pub. L. 117–103, div. W, title XV, § 1506(1), Mar. 15, 2022, 136 Stat. 956.)

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 3796hh–3 of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 2105 of Pub. L. 90–351 was renumbered section 2106 and is classified to section 10465 of this title.

note.heading: Effective Date of 2022 Amendment
note.p: Amendment by Pub. L. 117–103 not effective until Oct. 1 of the first fiscal year beginning after Mar. 15, 2022, see section 4(a) of div. W of Pub. L. 117–103, set out as an Effective Date note under section 6851 of Title 15, Commerce and Trade.
